MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
HOWARD M. GARFIELD, ESQ. OF LONG & LEVIT LLP, (415) 397-2222, FOR PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT, CAROLINA CASUALTY COMPANY
STEPHEN L. PORTER, ESQ. OF WHITEHEAD & PORTER LLP, (415) 781-6070, FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT THE SCOTT COMPANIES

RULING:
MATTER ARGUED. PLAINTIFF CAROLINA CASUALTY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE FIRST, SECOND AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION IS DISMISSED PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF PARTIES, FOURTH, FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION IS DENIED, SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS GRANTED, SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION ON THE PLEADINGS(CROSS-COMPLAINT) IS DENIED. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
